message:
fix: Fresh eyes code review - error handling and safety improvements

- internal/discovery/watcher.go: Fix ignored os.UserHomeDir() errors;
  move UserHomeDir calls inside switch cases to avoid blocking codex/gemini
  when their HOME env vars are set but UserHomeDir fails
- internal/wezterm/config.go: Fix ignored os.UserHomeDir() errors in
  extractIdentityFile (return empty string on error)
- internal/signals/log.go: Add f.Sync() before return for log durability
- internal/refresh/gemini.go, codex.go: Fix silenced io.ReadAll errors
  in HTTP error responses
- internal/provider/gemini/gemini.go: Add atomicWriteFile helper for
  atomic file writes in loginWithAPIKey
- internal/ratelimit/detector.go: Add mutex protection to ObservingWriter
  to prevent race conditions on shared buffer
- internal/provider/claude/claude.go, codex/codex.go: Atomic write helpers
  and error handling improvements
- internal/agent/agent.go: Error handling improvements
- internal/authpool/monitor.go: Error handling improvements
- internal/bundle/export.go: Atomic write patterns
- internal/config/spm_config.go: Error handling improvements
- internal/config/spm_config_test.go: Tests for config improvements
- internal/daemon/daemon.go: Error handling improvements
- internal/deploy/deploy.go: Atomic write patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
